item.title: McLaren point the finger at Mercedes HPP after Oscar Piastri’s double disaster to start 2026 F1 season
item.description: An initial report has muddied the waters as the Aussie struggles with a situation ‘difficult to process’.

item.title: Oscars 2026 winners list: All the victors at the 98th Academy Awards
item.description: See who won big at Hollywood’s night of nights.

item.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle slam new claims made by author Tom Bower in new book
item.description: The Duke of Sussex has dismissed shock allegations in a new biography written about him.

item.title: Guzman y Gomez co-CEO Hilton Brett cuts duties ahead of kidney transplant
item.description: Guzman y Gomez co-chief executive Hilton Brett will cut his workload as he prepares for a kidney transplant later this year, leaving a question mark over the company’s leadership in Australia.

item.title: Etiquette expert dissects Queen Mary’s behaviour during visit Down Under
item.description: The Australian-born Queen’s behaviour during her trip back to her homeland may have taken some people by surprise.

item.title: Ozempic, Wegovy maker Novo Nordisk to expand weight loss jab testing on kids
item.description: Novo Nordisk plans to trial its blockbuster drug on overweight teenagers in the Pacific, reflecting a shift underway in global health towards drugs that suppress appetite.

item.title: Looksmaxxing: Brisbane duo Androgenic and Nocturnal Kent take 7NEWS inside the internet’s latest self-help fad
item.description: ‘I’m just improving myself. You know, is somebody who goes to work every day or seeking a job insecure as well?’

item.title: Astron at Quinns Rocks runs out of unleaded petrol after customer fills jerry cans with $500 worth of fuel
item.description: A fuel shop attendant says tougher fuel limits are needed after a customer filled jerry cans with hundreds of dollars worth of petrol, emptying the service station.

item.title: NRL great Luke Keary tips Manly to make early move on under-fire coach Anthony Seibold
item.description: ‘The way they finished last year, and having the whole off season to make changes ... has anything changed?’

item.title: Australian children could be prescribed weight loss drugs like Wegovy to combat obesity
item.description: The controversial move has divided experts.

item.title: Fremantle coach Justin Longmuir slammed for ‘nonsensical’ comment about Opening Round
item.description: ‘When are they going to stop whinging?’

item.title: Family ties: Walker, Cochrane, Cooney, Hodge among AFL links to stacked 2026 draft hopefuls
item.description: A current coach, Brownlow medallist, club CEO and dozens of famous footy names from all 18 clubs have ties to this year’s draft hopefuls.

item.title: Moana Hope goes public after homophobic attack from ‘recently retired’ AFLW player
item.description: ‘I didn’t think homophobia had a place in AFLW, but apparently I was wrong. She has ‘til Friday to take responsibility.’

item.title: Aussie tennis star Marinko Matosevic turned coach cops four-year ban for doping
item.description: The sanction comes six weeks after he branded the International Tennis Integrity Agency ‘corrupt’.

item.title: Reality show producers spark backlash with request for unattractive people on sign at filming location
item.description: The production company behind the Bondi-based series has responded to the outcry over the placard.

item.title: Trainers Patrick and Michelle Payne mourn loss of truck driver Peter Butler and three horses after ‘awful’ accident
item.description: The stable offered their condolences to the family of the driver, while confirming a third horse died in the crash.

item.title: Queen Mary in Australia: The one piece of royal jewellery everyone’s talking about
item.description: The Danish monarchs are on their first state visit to Australia since ascending the throne two years ago.

item.title: Kayakers taken out by hot air balloon in Lake Burley Griffin during Canberra Spectacular
item.description: The moment was caught on camera as the men tried to paddle clear.

item.title: Sydney jeweller determined to show multiple sclerosis diagnosis isn’t a ‘death sentence’
item.description: The neurological disease affects young adults and, in Australia, affects three times more women than men.

item.title: Banksy’s identity exposed in bombshell investigation
item.description: Newly uncovered court records link the enigmatic Brit to a 2000 arrest in New York, offering the clearest evidence yet.

item.title: New South Wales and Western Australia draw in tense farewell for Sheffield Shield coaches
item.description: The Blues gave it a red-hot crack but narrowly ran out of time.

item.title: Israel says two top Iranian officials Ali Larijani and General Gholam Reza Soleimani killed in strikes
item.description: Israel’s Defence Minister says the men were ‘eliminated’ during overnight strikes.

item.title: Queensland researchers investigate modern diet link to rising bowel cancer rates in young Australians
item.description: Bowel cancer is now Australia's deadliest cancer for people aged 25 to 54.

item.title: Coldplay kiss cam HR exec Kristin Cabot blasts Ryan Reynolds, Gwyneth Paltrow, calls Andy Byron dishonest
item.description: In a bombshell new interview with Oprah Winfrey, Kristin Cabot has called out her former boss Andy Byron, as well as Ryan Reynolds and Gwyneth Paltrow.

item.title: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor scandal: Ex-prince makes outrageous demands in latest move to Marsh Farm
item.description: As Charles moves to strip his brother of any of his previous luxuries, the disgraced former prince is kicking up a fuss.

item.title: Carlos Alcaraz debuts kangaroo tattoo with map of Australia to commemorate Melbourne triumph
item.description: The world No.1’s distinctive new ink has been spotted six weeks after lifting the trophy.

item.title: New WA coach Beau Casson lifts lid on explosive Cam Green report
item.description: An interview with the Australian Test star lasted just 20 seconds before he reportedly ‘stormed off in a huff’.

item.title: Rates are up, but is now the right time for you to refinance?
item.description: What can refinancing really do for you.

item.title: Bjorn Baker confirms ‘risky’ move for Warwoven ahead of Golden Slipper
item.description: The blinkers will go on the leading contender as jockey Rachel King chases history.

item.title: One Nation leader Pauline Hanson targets ‘forgotten South Australians’ amid warnings her immigration claims are misleading
item.description: ‘People want change … people want a decent standard of living and a way of life.’

item.title: Dream homes, smart prices: Why this state is the new property hot spot
item.description: Is it time to make the move to Australia's smallest state?

item.title: Video of Gold Coast band Forever on High drummer wiping out on canal pontoon goes viral
item.description: One moment he was keeping the beat, the next he tumbled into shark-infested waters but that wasn’t the worst bit.

item.title: Soaring petrol prices amid Middle East conflict sparking fuel shortages drives thousands back to public transport
item.description: New figures reveal a massive shift in how we're getting to work, with one service breaking records.

item.title: Recall issued for Biocheese Pty Ltd’s Cheddar Shred 200g amid undeclared allergen
item.description: The alert has been issued nationally for the popular vegan product.

item.title: World leaders to call on Iran to open Strait of Hormuz amid fuel shortages as Israel reports more attacks on key leaders
item.description: The blockage of the Strait of Hormuz has led to fuel shortages and price rises globally.

item.title: 'No mould, no mildew': Could this be the world's healthiest house?
item.description: That is the intention behind the newly built home Casa Terra.

item.title: Women's soccer team arrive back in war-torn Iran from Australia
item.description: State media had branded the women ‘wartime traitors’.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Australian markets tumble as Iran hits key gas facility
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Tropical Cyclone Narelle reaches category 5 as army put on standby in Far North Queensland
item.description: ‘This is one of the bigger events that we’ve seen in some time.’

item.title: Jetstar launches huge sale on flights to domestic and international beach destinations
item.description: Over 60,000 fares have been slashed.

item.title: Alex de Minaur debuts new on-court look and gets immediate tick of approval from fiancée Katie Boulter
item.description: Fans may have a double take when the Aussie No.1 next steps out on court.

item.title: Pakistan and Afghanistan pause fighting after hundreds reportedly killed in strike on Kabul rehab centre
item.description: The Pakistani airstrike has increased tensions as the countries engage in ‘open war’.

item.title: Fuel Supply Taskforce announced by Prime Minister Anthony Albanese as supply uncertainty grows
item.description: The PM has revealed the government’s game plan and told Aussies how they can help.

item.title: Mike Smithson: SA braces for election shake‑up as One Nation rattles major parties
item.description: Labor is cruising toward a landslide while the Liberals brace for heavy losses.

item.title: Warning after parked Nissan Navara bursts into flames linked to overheated lithium batteries
item.description: Shocking CCTV shows smoke turning into an explosive dash fire in seconds.

item.title: Tropical Cyclone Narelle set to impact three states and territories as it heads for Queensland coast
item.description: Jane Bunn has broken down what we can expect when Cyclone Narelle reaches the coast.

item.title: Slice of history beckons for star jockey James McDonald and Aeliana at Rosehill
item.description: She has often played second fiddle to high-profile stablemates, but now it’s her time to shine.

item.title: Centrelink cash boost: Millions of Australians to receive Services Australia payment increase
item.description: ‘More than five million Aussies should expect to see a boost to their payments.’

item.title: Transport Subsidy Scheme: NSW taxi drivers now face $3000 fines for ‘ripping off’ passengers with disabilities in wheelchairs and with support animals
item.description: ‘This kind of discrimination will cost you.’

item.title: Late Hollywood legend Val Kilmer to appear via AI in new film
item.description: The actor was cast in the role - which he said ‘spoke to him both culturally and spiritually’ - before his death.

item.title: Aussie great Usman Khawaja celebrates ‘beautiful’ arrival as he begins retirement from first-class cricket
item.description: Stars gushed at the first family photos as the ‘lovely name’ maintained a sweet tradition.

item.title: Socceroos coach Tony Popovic fires parting shot at 21-year-old defector Adrian Segecic after Croatia move
item.description: The retired great has accused the young gun of giving up on Australia too easily, claiming it’s ‘better for him that he’s gone’.

item.title: Kyle Sandilands breaks silence after $100m contract terminated as ARN faces radio ratings crisis
item.description: Kyle Sandilands’ bombshell interview reveals he's not going down without a fight.

item.title: New bulk buying store Grosco takes on US giant Costco in Sydney's west
item.description: The store is offering cheaper prices on everyday staples but there's a key difference that sets it apart.

item.title: A Labubu movie is coming as Chinese firm expands viral toy franchise
item.description: The ugly-cute monster that went viral in 2025 is going to appear in cinemas.

item.title: Tina Turner’s name, image, likeness and most music catalogue rights acquired by Pophouse
item.description: Turner, known as the ‘Queen of Rock ’n’ Roll,’ died in 2023 at 83.

item.title: Sydney defender Tom McCartin called out for blatant flop after game-changing 50m penalty against Hawthorn
item.description: The 26-year-old gifted the lead - and eventually the win - to Hawthorn, and he could be forced to pay up for what he did next.

item.description: Three men who had sued the US actor after accusing him of sexual assault.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Middle East War live updates: Driving limits, flight cuts and fuel curbs loom as crisis bites
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Communities told to ‘take shelter now’ as Cyclone Narelle closes in on Far North Queensland
item.description: Emergency alerts have been issued for multiple areas in Far North Queensland.

item.title: Calls for Canberra’s GIO Stadium to get urgent upgrade after window smashes on Canterbury coach Cameron Ciraldo
item.description: ‘No good whingeing about it, because the people you’ve got to whinge to don’t give a sh**.’

item.title: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese makes hasty exit from Lakemba Mosque amid heckling incident
item.description: Hecklers called Albanese a ‘disgrace’ as he sat for Eid prayers in the Western Sydney mosque.

item.title: AC/DC guitarist Stevie Young hospitalised in Buenos Aires
item.description: The musician is ‘undergoing a full battery of tests’, a representative says.

item.title: World Cup on the edge as FIFA denies Iran’s request to play group stage matches in Mexico
item.description: FIFA’s ruling council has urgently met and made its position crystal clear.

item.title: Nissan Navara’s shock waste program revealed
item.description: Shock absorbers with only a few kilometres of use are being removed and scrapped at the dealership as part of the Navara’s pre-delivery program.

item.title: Five people injured by turbulence on board Delta Airlines flight from LA to Sydney
item.description: Three of the injured were taken to hospital.

item.title: Hawthorn star Nick Watson accuses Sydney fans of throwing bottles of Coke onto the MCG
item.description: Things became immediately ugly after the game and the gun forward is pointing fingers.

item.title: Insight from pre-game meeting uncovers Sam Mitchell genius as Hawthorn overcome Sydney
item.description: Hawthorn knew ‘straight away’ why their set-plays ‘won’t work tonight’, but they were already one step ahead.

item.title: Why March could be the perfect time to buy a new Volvo
item.description: SPONSORED: Volvo has exclusive offers available across its lineup of petrol, plug-in hybrid and fully electric models for the rest of March.

item.title: Canberra veteran Josh Papali’i facing a one-match ban for high shot on Samuel Hughes
item.description: The veteran’s stop-start beginning to 2026 is set to continue, while a Canterbury gun has also been sanctioned.

item.title: Mac Andrew’s dad speaks to hot-headed Gold Coast defender before Damien Hardwick needed to
item.description: ‘So, Mr Andrew, thank you very much.’

item.title: Cupra Born: Sporty EV pushed back for Australia... again
item.description: Aussies waiting for the Cupra Born's rebirth will have to wait even longer, with the Spanish brand unclear on when the EV hatch will return.

item.title: Teen charged after allegedly firing air gun at student at Sydney’s Rose Bay Secondary College
item.description: A student was allegedly struck in the back by a pellet.

item.title: Iran women’s football players make eyebrow-raising claims about Australian police after returning home
item.description: The footballers have appeared on local television and made some eyebrow-raising claims.

item.title: Are you on one of Australia’s most popular NBN plans?
item.description: If you’re unsure where to start, it helps to see which NBN plans Australians are choosing most.

item.title: Women’s Asian Cup Final: Australia confident they have the firepower to match Japan
item.description: Vice-captain Ellie Carpenter has played down fears Australia's Women's Asian Cup campaign will end in heartache as the Matildas face an in-form Japan.

item.title: WA man charged with 204 offences relating to crimes against children
item.description: The deeply distressing allegations have rocked a small community.

item.title: South Sydney suffer double blow as Campbell Graham’s horror run continues
item.description: Deflated Rabbitohs doctors have made made the call to bite the bullet.

item.title: Queen Mary Australia tour: Danish royal fights back tears during emotional speech in Hobart
item.description: ‘I’m a bit lost for words, I’m a bit overwhelmed.’

item.title: How to find the cheapest fuel: Hacks go viral as panic-buying causes ballooning bowser prices amid Middle East impact fears
item.description: ‘Fuel is a lot like toilet paper.’

item.title: Australian Idol Top 10: Singer Kesha Oayda fights to stay in the competition after ‘disappointing’ call
item.description: The Top 10 are locked in and preparing to sing live on Sunday for Australian Week.

item.title: Australian teen sensation Emerson Jones overcome with emotion after making tennis history
item.description: The rising star was still nine years away from being born when Jelena Dokic achieved the feat.

item.title: South Australian election: One Nation candidate Aoi Baxter has warrant for arrest in UK, dumped by party on election eve
item.description: The candidate for Adelaide is facing charges overseas.

item.title: Flights getting more expensive as Iran war drives fuel costs higher
item.description: Airlines are passing soaring fuel costs on to passengers as the conflict drives up global oil prices.

item.title: Fears for Sam Kerr’s fitness after wearing knee brace and strapping before Asian Cup final
item.description: The Matildas captain unusually skipped the press conference - then the questions kept coming after she arrived for training.

item.title: AFL legend Jonathan Brown announces shock brain tumour diagnosis after undergoing surgery
item.description: The footy world has immediately rallied around the 44-year-old and his family.

item.title: Renault Australia secures more Duster stock to combat refreshed Suzuki Jimny
item.description: Renault Duster sales have gotten off to a slow start, but the brand is hoping additional stock will help the small SUV grow in popularity.

item.title: Jeremaia Tuwai jailed for killing partner Nunia Wasakitoga Kurualeba in 'terrifying' stabbing at western Sydney apartment
item.description: ‘This is the ultimate form of coercive controlling behaviour.’

item.title: Hyundai and GM's new ute to be based on latest Chevrolet Colorado – report
item.description: Hyundai is expected to use the current Chevrolet Colorado platform for at least one of its new ute models.

item.title: Sydney father demands justice after son goaded into filmed fight in latest bullying incident
item.description: ‘I came here for a better life for my kids. It is totally unacceptable.’

item.title: ANALYSIS South Australian election looms as One Nation threatens Liberal strongholds
item.description: Political analyst Mike Smithson believes One Nation may not be as successful as previously touted.

item.title: Michelle Payne and brother Patrick announce the end of training partnership days after fatal crash
item.description: The grieving champion shared the sudden announcement at the end of a tragic week.

item.title: Panthers set dominant new record with thumping win over Roosters
item.description: There is no question Penrith are well on their way to recapturing their premiership-winning form.

item.title: Murderer Luke Hanif Sekkouah gets life for stabbing and burning girlfriend Erica Hay
item.description: ‘Erica was defenceless against your violence.’

item.title: Reece Walsh fires up as Broncos conquer Storm all over again in NRL grand final rematch
item.description: Brisbane secured their first win in Melbourne since 2016 with a stunning fightback against their grand final rivals.

item.title: Cyclone Narelle heading for Northern Territory between Birany Birany and Ngukurr bringing risk of life-threatening flooding
item.description: One of Australia's most powerful storms is set to wreak havoc on another weather-weary part of the country.

item.title: Boos rain down as Bulldogs miracle spoils Izak Rankine’s return for Adelaide Crows
item.description: The star forward had ‘every single Crows fan out of their seat’ before an unlikely hero won it for the Bulldogs.
